_comment: Workflow recipes — composite chains that run several skills in sequence, passing each output forward as context for the next. Single source of truth: consumed by the slash commands (commands/<command>.md), the MCP server (list_workflows/get_workflow), and WORKFLOWS.md. Each step names an existing skill in skills/<skill>/SKILL.md.

workflows.name: Ship a Feature
workflows.summary: Take a raw feature idea from fuzzy brief all the way to a launch plan, end to end.

steps.produces: a sharp problem statement and scoped boundaries
a full PRD with goals, requirements, and success metrics
a RICE score positioning this work against alternatives
where this sits on the roadmap and the story around it
a launch plan: audience, messaging, channels, and timeline

workflows.name: Close the Quarter
workflows.summary: Turn the quarter's raw numbers into a leadership-ready story and board deck.

steps.produces: the metric tree and what actually moved
why customers left and what is avoidable
a tight leadership briefing of the quarter
a slide-by-slide board deck storyline

workflows.name: Launch a Product
workflows.summary: Go from competitive landscape to positioning to a fully checklisted launch and press release.

steps.produces: the competitive map and gaps to exploit
positioning, value props, and messaging pillars
the GTM plan across audience and channels
an owner-by-owner launch readiness checklist
the announcement press release

workflows.name: Rescue an Account
workflows.summary: Diagnose an at-risk customer and build the full save play through to renewal.

steps.produces: a health score with the specific risk drivers
the root cause and whether the risk is avoidable
an internal escalation brief for the save
the renewal strategy and negotiation plan

workflows.name: Run Discovery
workflows.summary: From a vague opportunity to validated insight and a prioritised next step.

steps.produces: a one-page problem brief from the fuzzy opportunity
a screener and discussion guide for user interviews
themes and insights from the research
a ranked, defensible list of what to do next

workflows.name: Repurpose Content
workflows.summary: Turn one blog post, video, or idea into a full platform-native content pack — thread, LinkedIn, newsletter, carousel, and short-form script — with sharpened hooks and a thumbnail concept.

steps.produces: platform-native drafts for X, LinkedIn, newsletter, carousel and short-form video
steps.passes: the drafts and the core idea

steps.produces: stronger, scroll-stopping hooks for each piece
a thumbnail concept for the video version

workflows.name: Launch an AI Feature
workflows.summary: Take an AI/LLM feature idea from a probabilistic-aware PRD through retrieval/agent design, an eval plan with a ship bar, a cost & latency budget, and a launch-ready model card.

steps.produces: a PRD designed for a probabilistic system — uncertainty UX, guardrails, fallback, and a quality bar
steps.passes: the feature scope, stakes, and quality bar

steps.produces: the retrieval/generation design (chunking, retrieval, reranking, grounding, failure modes)
steps.passes: the system design and grounding approach

steps.produces: an eval harness: datasets, rubrics, baselines, a ship threshold, and a regression gate
steps.passes: the metrics and the ship bar

steps.produces: per-request token math, model tiering, caching, p95 targets, and spend guardrails
a launch-ready model card: intended use, sliced eval, limitations, and a rollback trigger

workflows.name: Grow a Product
workflows.summary: Turn a growth goal into a full-funnel diagnosis, a prioritised experiment backlog, a retention loop, and the lifecycle journeys that nurture users — a joined-up growth plan.

steps.produces: a full-funnel map with the biggest leak identified and a 90-day focus
steps.passes: the focus stage and the metric to move

steps.produces: a prioritised, properly-powered experiment backlog (ICE) against that stage
steps.passes: the top experiments and the target metric

steps.produces: a retention/engagement loop (trigger→action→reward→investment) and activation path
steps.passes: the loop and the habit milestone

steps.produces: behaviour-triggered lifecycle journeys that drive the loop, with holdouts and suppression
